storyInfo: After a cathartic performance, Ave{@nbs}Mujica finally returns to the Castle of Dreams. With this episode concluded, they shall remain together as Ave{@nbs}Mujica.

attributes.content: The ending note settles. Sakiko's hand lingers on the keyboard.
Faint echoes of music reverberate on through the empty castle halls.
Saki... chan...?
From beside comes a voice long unheard, yet one she could not know any more intimately. She slowly lifts her head.
We finally... finally...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...We finally got to meet, Saki-chan.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: It feels like I had this long, long dream... and I was this close to never waking up.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Saki-chan, we've been going in circles for so long. We almost missed each other again.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: And before Sakiko stands not just Uika, but her entire band.
It was like someone gave me a pull, and then I just showed up here.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Blehhh! Why are we being so serious?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: But Saki, you're smiling so happily.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Sakiko has to squint beneath the bright spotlight hanging above. Everything before her feels so unreal, so dreamlike.
But she knows, she knows—
Once more, they have played the music that belongs to them.
The girls of Ave{@nbs}Mujica have finally come back.
Yes! Of course I am, I'm so happy...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Uika... Mutsumi.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Nyamu... Umiri.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I missed you... I missed you so badly.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: All of you—welcome back.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Struggling chirping)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: I'm guessing these things put us to sleep?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: The dreams... they're not working...
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: No... no...
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: You can't leave... you have to... stay here!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Piercing screech)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: —Watch out!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Wolff!!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Morpheus, cut your losses!
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Don't you lecture me with words you cribbed from a storybook!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Sakiko, take them and—argh!
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Before Wolff can finish, an army of threads skewers through its arms, expelling the cotton within.
Oh, crap! Up there—
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Countless Corettons circle above, weaving a massive dreamcatcher.
It begins to press in towards the girls, growing ever larger and larger.
Morpheus... see the error of your ways!
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: A huge pair of scissors falls from the sky, shredding the dream web into naught but tiny wisps of silk that drift in the air.
(Panicked screech)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: Who was that?!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Nngh—!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: The girl gives a few twitches in midair before plummeting to the ground, faster and faster—
Are... are we safe now?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: What in the world is happening...?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Apologies for our lateness.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: M-Miss Iris! We owe a debt to you for your aid... Thank you.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko is overcome with relief at seeing the familiar fairy. Her exhaustion swiftly catches up, and she feels the strength drain from her as she collapses.
A dull thud echoes through the hall.
Saki-chaaaan!
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Sakiko... Sakiko...
(Who is it... now...)
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Bit by bit, Sakiko regains consciousness, and is greeted by a faint fragrance.
Her eyes flutter open, and she finds herself lying on a soft velvet sofa, a brown-haired girl sitting by her side.
Ah. Have you come to?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: You fainted. Going through dreamland after dreamland like that takes a toll on the body.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Though I'd say it's quite incredible you lasted that long despite never encountering such Originium Arts before.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Are the others...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You needn't fret, I've arranged rooms for them. Bena is with them right now.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Oh, I don't believe I've introduced myself—I am Iris, the present Master of the Castle of Dreams.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: We've seen plenty of each other in my dreams... If this is our first time meeting, then who were you before?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, as Morpheus demonstrated for you—some fairies of the Castle of Dreams possess the rare Arts to spin dreams.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: That said, it's no omnipotent thing. What dreams a caster spins are ultimately limited by their own knowledge of the target.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Morpheus didn't understand you, nor did she regard you as an equal adversary. That is why the dream she spun was so flawed.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: As for why you met me, I would suppose... that was Grandmother's work.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Grandmother?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yes. The Castle of Dreams's previous Master. She spends all her time in a secluded room to convalesce now, owing to her frail health.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: She gave me this necklace, you see, and over the last few days, it had been terribly temperamental with its energies. Bena and I scrambled to return just in case something was amiss... What a terrible turn of affairs we found.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I see...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Something just started up over there. You're not safe alone. Go the long way round, quick.
attributes.name: Kind Old Lady

attributes.content: ...Thank you for the warning.
attributes.name: Behatted Girl

attributes.content: I heard from an old woman nearby...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You should hurry home.
attributes.name: Kind Townsperson

attributes.content: The nights are dark here. Now don't you get lost again.
attributes.name: Florist Lady

attributes.content: Miss Sakiko. As the Master of the Castle of Dreams, I beg your forgiveness for all that's transpired.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I suppose you could hardly pardon Morpheus, after all she's done...?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Actually... By all rights I should hate her, but I don't feel that way at all.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...What?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: She was quite right, actually. Ave{@nbs}Mujica as a group was never very tightly-knit.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: When I made that initial bet with her, it was solely because I wanted the band members back. It was an act of rash judgment.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But after entering their dreams only to be rejected by each of them in turn, it finally dawned on me that I hadn't a clue how they felt inside.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Within the dreams she'd spun, we tried to hide our weakest, most fragile parts beneath a beautiful facade.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yet did I ever attempt to know my companions, with whom I'd spent so many days and nights?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Had I truly resolved to bear the weight of their lives?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: As I fell through the abyss of Limbo, these were the questions I asked myself in infinitude.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Miss Sakiko...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: But when I finally straightened out my heart, awakened my companions, and stood once again before Morpheus, it wasn't just anger I felt...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: It was also a deep, deep sorrow.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In that moment, we looked each other in the eyes. It hit me. My power was frail no longer; I had my friends by my side.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: While she stood by herself, alone as ever, with naught but creations that bent to her will and whim.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: She was the dreamspinner. She knew better than all of us how nothing in the land of dreams was real.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: And yet she still chose to lose herself in such dreams. Surely, she must have had her reasons?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hah-hahahahah-hah! You're a heartless monster!
No wonder your parents don't want you!
You'll never live through the winter!
No! You're lying!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Get lost, all of you!!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Uh-oh—run!
Morpheus, are you alright?!
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Oh, Iris, is it—is it true what they said?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: They're naughty children, right? The fairies won't bring sweet dreams to them, right?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I'm not a heartless monster, and my parents didn't abandon me, and I can live through the winter, right?!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Morpheus...
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Oh, Iris, answer me!!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: There are reasons that Morpheus cannot live outside the Castle of Dreams.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: There is no storybook beauty in these lands. What Morpheus had to endure left her unable to place her trust in the sweet dreams of fairytales.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: And I know full well that the Castle's sweet dreams hardly solve every problem...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: 'In the face of reality, what we can accomplish is so very limited.'
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: 'It is but one thing. We nestle a seed deep in the depths of a child's heart.'
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: 'Likely, it is what they considered the most important event, or thing, to them as children.'
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: 'It usually lies quietly deep within. But at crucial moments—when people are at their weakest—it gives them strength.'
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: These words...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Are the very words you spoke to me in my dream, Miss Iris. Now, I offer these same words back to you.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I venture that perhaps, Morpheus is awaiting a dream that lets her become 'grown-up', once and for all.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: As the moon rises, the doll takes on life—see, have the moons not risen?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris looks outside. Pale and gentle moonlight shines down on the two of them through the castle window.
Yes. You're right.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Furthermore, Miss Iris, I do have a request...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Pray tell. I'll do what's in my power.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: The five of us have awakened from our dreams, but we don't seem to have returned to our own world...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Being the Master of the Castle of Dreams, I was wondering if you might know a method by which we can go back?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I happened to hear them describe this 'world' of yours while you were unconscious. From what I could gather, it certainly doesn't sound like any city on Terra.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: But I've never happened across a case like yours before, and a full trawl of the Castle's archives turned up nothing either.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I intend to contact Rhodes Island—the Doctor there is quite learned, and should know a way to send you back.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Rhodes Island... the pharmaceutical company?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Indeed. You dreamt of it?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Yes. I'd be keen on visiting again, and I have some 'old friends' I'd like to meet while I'm... um...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Is something the matter?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I... I'm starting to forget what they looked like.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris gently takes Sakiko's hand, as though anticipating her confusion.
Miss Sakiko. You've been through so many people's dreams. I'm sure you know the Castle's rules through and through by now.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: As with all dreams, the memories will begin to blur and fade from the moment you wake up.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Someday or other, you'll return to your 'world', and when you do, you'll forget about me, about the Castle's sweet dreams, about Terra itself.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: How could I...!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But what happens here will not simply be for naught.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Perhaps you and your friends will have to confront those recurring problems when you go back... but I trust you'll prevail.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Even if you forget everything that happened here, you'll remember the courage you showed in times of hardship.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Yes. I trust we will too...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: And when we return to our own world, Ave{@nbs}Mujica will remain together as Ave{@nbs}Mujica.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: And I, Master of the Castle of Dreams, will forever remember you as you are now, as 'children'.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Perhaps I'll show up again one day, when you're all grown up—and when I do, I hope you and your friends will still be writing the story of your lives through music.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: We have a promise!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What is that noise outside the door...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: We don't have another troublemaker, do we?!
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Sakiko hurries to open the door.
Saki-chan—you're awake! Are you feeling okay?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (Half-conscious chirping)
attributes.name: Bumbling Corettons

attributes.content: Erm, I'm fine... Can you explain what all the noise out here is about?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: We're setting up a new stage, and Miss Bena's making Morpheus use these little creatures to carry stuff around...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: A new stage?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yeah. Who knows how long we'll be here for. Might as well rehearse while we've got the chance.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: There are so many songs I still want to work on.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Morpheus wanted to build the stage in a dream, but we and Miss Bena unanimously shot that down.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Yeah, I'll pass on dreams for the next while...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Agreed...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Won't somebody show me a smidge of concern? Why am I being given hard labor?!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Angry chirping)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: Bena, accompanying Morpheus, offers no words, instead simply giving one of Morpheus' fluffy ears a nice hard flick.
Ahkh—ow-ow-ow!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Pained chirping)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: You did the crime, now you do the time, Morpheus...
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Oh, you're in this with me, Wolff! Go fit that last light!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I... alright.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Wolff places its hands on the ground, and in a snap, transforms before everyone's eyes into a bestial shape.
With the light's power cord held gently in its jaws, it leaps up to the top shelf, and effortlessly drapes it over.
Well? How's that for a new stage?
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: It's so pretty—!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Nyamu giddily leaps onstage and darts around set after elaborate set.
Humph. Hardly a challenge for me.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Are you forgetting the most important part? The instruments!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Ighk—stop—flicking my ears, I'll bring them out now!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Each instrument appears on stage while Morpheus is still shielding her ears, and the band takes their places.
Mm. Still feels good in the hands.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: (Here's hoping that dream-long blank I had didn't screw up my muscle memory—)
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Sakiko, we're all ready. Come on.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Sakiko looks up to see her companions on stage, the spotlight shining on each one of them, as well as a familiar keyboard that seems to call for her return.
I look forward to your performance, Miss Sakiko.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: We missed out on seeing the whole thing last time! Now we can make up for that.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: (Joyful chirping)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: Getting to attend your performance, not as an enemy, but as a friend, makes me happier than anything.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Oh, you people are such goody-two-shoes!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: A—Anyhow... I'll be listening closely.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Pft... hahahaha...!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Wh-What are you laughing at? Don't think you can walk all over me just because Iris and Bena are here...
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: No, nothing... haha! I'm coming now.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko takes her bandmates' hands, and steps onto the stage of Ave{@nbs}Mujica.
Much as when the last piece of a puzzle falls in place, the picture comes as no particular surprise, but it is the very moment when everything becomes whole again.
Everyone! Upon this land, we shall leave our sound!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In the moonlight, the doll takes on a temporal life.
Beneath their marionette forms, the girls' secrets lie.
Love. Fear. Sorrow. Death. Oblivion.
In a castle of dreams, secrets and sins join together and come alive once more.
Raise your candle high. Be brave through the thorns. Part this fog.
Here, a new fairytale is born.
This is the wondrous adventure story of us, the dolls.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Welcome... to the world of Ave{@nbs}Mujica.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
